versions.label: Version archive navigation + cache-busting changelog
changes: Added version archive file routing so selecting a version in the changelog loads that version HTML file.
Version history JSON is now fetched with cache-busting and no-store to keep changelog data current.
Prepared archived version files under versions/<version>/ so you can move backward/forward from the popup.

versions.label: Version switching polish + smoother HUD
changes: Kept the changelog modal open when switching versions and highlighted the currently active version so past/future versions stay visible.
Fixed stat-chip number jitter by reserving numeric width to stop Step/Generation text from jumping at high speeds.
Made 'Reached target' update live during each generation so successful agents are visible immediately instead of only at generation rollover.

versions.label: Learning + speed controls
changes: Added an in-page explanation panel that explains target, active dots, generation resets, and fitness scoring.
Added simulation speed control (multiple simulation steps per animation frame).
Added semantic version footer and clickable changelog modal loaded from this separate file.
Enabled switching between saved version profiles by clicking version numbers in the changelog.

versions.label: Original visual GA demo
changes: Initial canvas-based GA dots simulation with target, obstacle, mutation, population control, and restart.
Implemented weighted parent selection, crossover, mutation, and elitism.
Added best-trail drawing and generation statistics chips.
